description: CompositionGreen polo neck T-shirt with navy blue stripes, made of 100% cotton, has navy blue ribbed collar, short sleeves, concealed button placket, patch pocket on the upper left chest and a vented hemFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not wring or tumble dryDry flat in shadeMedium ironThe concealed placket and cleverly mitired patch pocket on the upper left chest adds sophisticated styling to this striped polo neck T-shirt from turtle. The soft cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day, while the fashionable cuts offer a flattering silhouette. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with chinos or jeans, and sneakers.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
